title: helianthemum × moyense
intro: Helianthemum × moyense, also known as Rockrose, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Helianthemum and Cistus genera. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum × moyense include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat minor cuts, burns, and skin conditions.
